caption: A meeting of the "House Committee on General, Housing, and Military Affairs" takes place in an office setting with wood-paneled walls and a large screen. Several men are seated at a long table; one man in a dark suit and glasses rests his chin on his hand, while another man with a beard and a dark suit sits beside him, also resting his head on his hand. A third man, wearing a grey vest over a white shirt, sits further down the table. A woman with blonde hair is partially visible in the foreground. On the table are water bottles, papers, and a white thermos. A banner at the bottom of the frame features the "ORCA" logo and the date "April 12, 2019," alongside the text "S.23 Increasing the Minimum Wage" highlighted in green. The scene remains static across the frames, with the individuals maintaining their contemplative poses.
